messages.foundPokemon: You have found the mystery Pokémon!

share.title: PokéNerdle Daily #{{number}}
share.challengeFailed: Failed to solve the challenge today. Better luck tomorrow!

type.incorrect: <type></type> type moves deal {{count}}x damage against the target (ignoring abilities).

generation.correct: Target is from the same generation!
generation.earlier: Target is from an earlier generation!
generation.later: Target is from a later generation!

color.correct: Target's base form is also {{color}} in color!
color.incorrect: Target's base form is not {{color}} in color!

gameplay.foundPokemon: You have found the mystery Pokémon!

gameplay.guessPrompt_other: Can you guess the mystery Pokémon in {{count}} attempts?

correctAnswer.firstGuess: Incredible! You got it on your first guess!
correctAnswer.foundInAttempts: You found the mystery Pokémon in {{num_guesses}}/{{max_guesses}} tries!
correctAnswer.usedAllAttempts: You've used all {{max_guesses}} attempts. Better luck tomorrow!

completion.nextChallenge: Come back tomorrow for a new challenge!
